leadText: Route 3 (Japanese: ３番道路 Route 3) is a route in southern Kalos, connecting Santalune Forest and Santalune City. The route is also known as Ouvert Way (Japanese: ウベール通り Ouvert Way).

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Name origin [ edit | edit source ] Ouvert is French for open.
